servers.name: cua-driver
servers.comment: 推荐：Cua Driver MCP。Windows: %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Cua\cua-driver\bin\cua-driver.exe · 安装 scripts/setup-cua-driver.ps1 -InstallMcp

servers.name: computer-use
servers.comment: 备选：codex-computer-use-linux。工具：doctor, get_app_state, screenshot, scroll。Sharker：bash scripts/setup-computer-use.sh

servers.name: read-aloud
servers.comment: cargo build --release -p codex-read-aloud-linux。工具：doctor, read_aloud, stop。Kokoro：bash scripts/install-kokoro-runtime.sh

servers.name: playwright
servers.comment: Browser 自动化 MCP（与 builtin browser_* 二选一或并存）

_browser_use_native_host.comment: 非 MCP：Chrome 扩展 Browser Use 需 codex-chrome-extension-host + native messaging manifest
